[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Scoring review queue (page+write-back+generator), Edgar hardening, and auto-advance default flip
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/56
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/57
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/372

  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/273
  
  Details:
  Continuation of the contribution-review work plus the auto-advance policy change. (1) Review-queue DApp page: fixed the never-integration-tested page end to end — endpoints (/api/v1 drop), governor/Sentinel auth via dao_members.json, contributor list, response/field mapping, and the RSA signing (raw-base64 PKCS#8 key + canonical payload that Edgar verifies); DApp-UI conformance (light Saffron-Monk theme, logo/nav/footer, infinite-scroll spinner); promoted beta->prod (dapp.truesight.me). (2) GAS write-back correctness: look up Scored Chatlogs by Col K (hash), match (hash+contributor) so multi-contributor splits land on the right row, and persist the reviewer-selected contributor to Col A; redeployed. (3) Edgar: block unknown/hallucinated contributor names on review approval (422 at the trust boundary), and delete review cache by safe-hash prefix; deployed to dao_protocol_nelanco. (4) Cache generator: rewrote generate_review_cache.py (it had never run — typo crash, <14-col skip, unsafe <hash>.json filenames, wrong description column); filesystem-safe <safe_hash>__<row>.json + non-fatal Col N; triggered the GitHub Action to populate 907 real Pending-Review records. (5) Authored the Sophia contribution-scoring handoff plan (gated, ~90.7k TDG). (6) Auto-advance default flip (per Gary): inverted §5c to auto-by-default with an always-stop rule for irreversible/outward units (deploy/merge/TDG/UAT), fixed the parser fail-closing on bold tracker cells, unblocked the Proposal CLI plan; shipped + deployed to Sophia's box.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
